segments.text: Hear this word that I have spoken against you, O children of Israel, against the whole family which I brought up from the land of Egypt
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: You only have I known of all the families of the earth: therefore I will punish you for all your iniquities
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Can two walk together, except they be agreed?
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Will a lion roar in the forest, when he hath no prey? will a young lion cry out of his den, if he have taken nothing?
segments.speaker: The LORD

footnotes: cry: Heb. give forth his voice

segments.text: Can a bird fall in a snare upon the earth, where no gin is for him? shall one take up a snare from the earth, and have taken nothing at all?
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Shall a trumpet be blown in the city, and the people not be afraid? shall there be evil in a city, and the LORD hath not done it?
segments.speaker: The LORD

footnotes: the LORD…: or, shall not the LORD do somewhat?

segments.text: Surely the Lord GOD will do nothing, but he revealeth his secret unto his servants the prophets
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: The lion hath roared, who will not fear? the Lord GOD hath spoken, who can but prophesy?
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Publish in the palaces at Ashdod, and in the palaces in the land of Egypt, and say, Assemble yourselves upon the mountains of Samaria, and behold the great tumults in the midst thereof, and the oppressed in the midst thereof
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: For they know not to do right, who store up violence and robbery in their palaces
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: An adversary there shall be even round about the land; and he shall bring down thy strength from thee, and thy palaces shall be spoiled
segments.speaker: The Lord GOD

segments.text: As the shepherd taketh out of the mouth of the lion two legs, or a piece of an ear; so shall the children of Israel be taken out that dwell in Samaria in the corner of a bed, and in Damascus in a couch
segments.speaker: The LORD

footnotes: in Damascus…: or, on the bed's feet

segments.text: Hear ye, and testify in the house of Jacob
segments.speaker: The Lord GOD, the God of hosts

segments.text: In the day that I shall visit the transgressions of Israel upon him I will also visit the altars of Beth-el: and the horns of the altar shall be cut off, and fall to the ground
segments.speaker: The Lord GOD

segments.text: I will smite the winter house with the summer house; and the houses of ivory shall perish, and the great houses shall have an end
segments.speaker: The LORD
